C

The symptoms to watch for worry me. The instructions say to call doctor if have fever over 101 or chills, shortness of breath, cough, or chest pain. I'm not completely sure I understand when these symptoms are serious enough to call, and I want to make sure I don't miss something important. Also, I visit emergency room often, so I want to be clear about when to call doctor versus when to go to emergency room.
